D2 Vision L3 Apply Reference

Seeing as a Dichromat

toggle protan, deutan, or tritan and watch a hue wheel collapse along that dichromat's confusion axis

With one cone class absent, two of the three colour dimensions remain. Colours that differed only along the lost axis become indistinguishable — they fall on a confusion line.

The top wheel is normal trichromatic vision. Toggle the dichromat type and watch the bottom wheel lose a whole band of distinctions — red-green for protan and deutan, blue-yellow for tritan.
